title: Local operator utility baseline
goal: Build a small, evidence-friendly Heim-PC utility baseline around backup, monitoring, shell history, local transfer, review/search tools and document processing without creating a second control-plane or second knowledge truth.
completion: Backups have at least one successful snapshot and one documented restore probe.
Monitoring starts with Beszel and remains observational only.
Atuin runs locally without cloud sync or AI features until a separate secret/history review approves more.
LocalSend, difftastic and ripgrep-all improve transfer, review and search without becoming authoritative evidence by themselves.
Paperless-ngx, Stirling PDF and Docling are introduced only after backup boundaries and import/export evidence are clear.
CopyQ, Espanso and EasyEffects are treated as existing tools to configure safely, not as new control surfaces.
Kopia, lazygit, KDE Connect/GSConnect, Zellij, Windmill, Open WebUI, AnythingLLM, Dyad and n8n remain parked unless a later explicit decision reopens them.

metadata.source: User request on 2026-07-09 to implement the evaluated utility plan and register it in Bureau.
live_basis: Live check on 2026-07-08 found restic, CopyQ, Espanso, rg, Bitwarden CLI, Docker, Flatpak, Snap, apt and EasyEffects present on heim-pc.
Live check did not find atuin, LocalSend, Beszel, Backrest, Paperless, Stirling PDF, Docling, rga or difftastic in PATH/container candidates.
metadata.endstate_evidence: heimgewebe/infra runtime/local-utility-endstate-2026-07-09.md and heimgewebe/heim-pc runtime/software-inventory.md after Taildrop transfer closeout

verified_followups.paperless: Starter taxonomy, export and local restic backup are in place.
verified_followups.backup: Local restic utility snapshot b9332c01 exists and timers are active.
verified_followups.easyeffects: Profile plan is defined; activation requires listening/recording validation.
verified_followups.beszel: Beszel monitoring is active for heim-pc with systems=1, system_stats>=44, container_stats>=44, containers=11 and status=up.
verified_followups.transfer: Remote device transfer is verified through Tailscale Taildrop; LocalSend remains prepared for LAN only.

lifecycle_hygiene_repair.reason: bureau doctor lifecycle recommendation after all UTIL-BASE-V1 tasks are verified

metadata.closeout_status: Reopened by UTIL-BASE-V1-T013. Probe-as-write hardening remains planned; no runtime script replacement, timer mutation, backup execution, retention or prune action is authorized by this lifecycle correction.
metadata.lifecycle_reopened_20260710: PR #392 registered UTIL-BASE-V1-T013 as a planned follow-up after the previous completion-ready closeout; the initiative is active again until that hardening task is resolved.
